Title: Successful Login with Google Account
Preconditions: User has a Google account and internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Click on the Google sign-in option.
4. Enter valid credentials and click sign-in.
5. Confirm the account selection if prompted.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the FamilyActivity.

Title: Create New Family
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permissions to create a family.
Test Data: Valid family details (name, surname, gender, date).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create family screen.
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
3. Click on the create button.
Expected Result: Family is created successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Access Monitoring Section
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the monitoring section.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the home screen.
3. Access the menu at the bottom of the page.
4. Select the monitoring section.
Expected Result: User is directed to the monitoring section.

Title: Add Note
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the note section.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the home screen.
3. Access the menu at the bottom of the page.
4. Select the notes section.
5. Click on the add note button.
6. Enter valid note content and save.
Expected Result: Note is added successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: View Graphs in Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the profile section.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the profile screen.
3. Access the graphs section.
Expected Result: User can view graphs related to sleep, breastfeeding, and growth.

Title: Start and Stop Breastfeeding Timer
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the breastfeeding section.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the breastfeeding screen.
3. Click on the start timer button for left breast.
4. Wait for a few seconds.
5. Click on the stop timer button for left breast.
Expected Result: Timer starts and stops correctly, displaying the elapsed time accurately.

Title: Log Sleep Duration
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the sleep section.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the sleep screen.
3. Enter valid sleep duration and save.
Expected Result: Sleep duration is logged successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Log Growth Measurement
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to the growth section.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the growth screen.
3. Enter valid growth measurement and save.
Expected Result: Growth measurement is logged successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Logout Successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the profile screen.
3. Click on the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User has a Google account but enters invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Click on the Google sign-in option.
4. Enter invalid credentials and click sign-in.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating failed login.

Title: Login Attempt without Internet Connection
Preconditions: User has a Google account but no internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Click on the Google sign-in option.
4. Enter valid credentials and click sign-in.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating no internet connection.

Title: Create Family with Empty Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to create a family.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create family screen.
2. Leave one or more required fields empty.
3. Click on the create button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields cannot be empty.

Title: Deny Access to Menu
Preconditions: User is logged in and navigates to the home screen.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the home screen.
3. Access the menu at the bottom of the page.
4. Deny access to the menu.
Expected Result: User remains on the home screen without navigating to other sections.

Title: Edit Existing Note
Preconditions: User is logged in and has existing notes.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the home screen.
3. Access the menu at the bottom of the page.
4. Select the notes section.
5. Click on an existing note to edit.
6. Modify the note content and save.
Expected Result: Note is edited successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: View Graphs with Missing Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has incomplete data for graphs.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the profile screen.
3. Access the graphs section.
Expected Result: Graphs display appropriately with placeholders for missing data.

Title: Reset Breastfeeding Timer
Preconditions: User is logged in and has started a breastfeeding timer.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the breastfeeding screen.
3. Click on the reset timer button for left breast.
Expected Result: Timer resets to zero, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Log Invalid Sleep Duration
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to log sleep duration.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the sleep screen.
3. Enter an invalid sleep duration and save.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid input.

2. Navigate to the growth screen.
3. Enter an invalid growth measurement and save.

Title: Abandon Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in and wants to abandon their profile.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the profile screen.
3. Click on the abbandona button.
4. Confirm the action.
Expected Result: Profile is abandoned successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - Long Sleep Duration
Preconditions: User is logged in and logs a very long sleep duration.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the sleep screen.
3. Enter an extremely high sleep duration and save.
Expected Result: Sleep duration is logged successfully, and a warning message is displayed indicating unusual data.

Title: Edge Case - Short Sleep Duration
Preconditions: User is logged in and logs a very short sleep duration.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the sleep screen.
3. Enter an extremely low sleep duration and save.
Expected Result: Sleep duration is logged successfully, and a warning message is displayed indicating unusual data.

Title: Edge Case - Long Growth Measurement
Preconditions: User is logged in and logs a very high growth measurement.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the growth screen.
3. Enter an extremely high growth measurement and save.
Expected Result: Growth measurement is logged successfully, and a warning message is displayed indicating unusual data.

Title: Edge Case - Short Growth Measurement
Preconditions: User is logged in and logs a very low growth measurement.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the growth screen.
3. Enter an extremely low growth measurement and save.
Expected Result: Growth measurement is logged successfully, and a warning message is displayed indicating unusual data.

Title: Edge Case - Long Breastfeeding Duration
Preconditions: User is logged in and logs a very long breastfeeding duration.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the breastfeeding screen.
3. Start the timer for left breast.
4. Wait for an extremely long duration.
5. Stop the timer for left breast.
Expected Result: Breastfeeding duration is logged successfully, and a warning message is displayed indicating unusual data.

Title: Edge Case - Short Breastfeeding Duration
Preconditions: User is logged in and logs a very short breastfeeding duration.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the breastfeeding screen.
3. Start the timer for left breast.
4. Wait for an extremely short duration.
5. Stop the timer for left breast.
Expected Result: Breastfeeding duration is logged successfully, and a warning message is displayed indicating unusual data.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Timers Running Simultaneously
Preconditions: User is logged in and starts multiple timers simultaneously.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the breastfeeding screen.
3. Start the timer for left breast.
4. Without stopping the left breast timer, start the timer for right breast.
Expected Result: Both timers run simultaneously, and a warning message is displayed indicating multiple timers running.
